failures.testTitle: TC-GEN-001 Admin logs in and lands on dashboard smoke test
failures.reasoning: Timeout during fixture setup indicates infrastructure or configuration issue, not application behavior or test flakiness.
failures.suggestedAction: Verify network connectivity to OrangeHRM instance and check if adminUser fixture has correct credentials/URL configuration.
failures.errorMessage: [31mTest timeout of 30000ms exceeded while setting up "adminUser".[39m

failures.testTitle: TC-GEN-024 Add Item to Cart full flow
failures.reasoning: Test expects navigation to cart.html after add-to-cart action, but user remains on inventory-item.html indicating the cart navigation step failed or was never triggered.
failures.suggestedAction: Review the add-to-cart-flow test steps to verify the cart icon/button click action is present and targets the correct selector after adding item to cart.

failures.suggestedAction: Add explicit step to open the sidebar menu before asserting visibility of inventory-sidebar-link.

failures.reasoning: Test code incorrectly uses toBeVisible on a locator matching multiple elements without .first() or .nth(), violating Playwright strict mode.
failures.suggestedAction: Fix test to use .first() or assert count with .toHaveCount(6) if verifying all items are present.

failures.reasoning: Test code violates Playwright strict mode by using a non-unique selector that matches 6 inventory items instead of one.
